meta.title: Socialo — There's gotta be a way to automate that.
meta.description: Socialo builds custom AI automation for small and mid-sized businesses. You tell us what's bugging you — we build exactly what you need.

hero.headline: there's gotta be a way to automate that.
hero.sub: You tell us what's bugging you. We fix it.

problem.label: Sound familiar?
items: Your team spends 3 hours a day on emails that all ask the same thing.
Orders come in through email, phone, and WhatsApp — and someone has to manually enter every single one into your system.
Your system does 80% right — but that last 20% costs your team frustration every day.

whatWeDo.heading: We handle it, you run your business.
whatWeDo.sub: We figure out where you're losing time — and build exactly what's needed. Not from a catalog, but tailor-made. These are three areas where we often start:

services.title: Customer communication
services.description: We automate your customer communication so your clients get a solid answer right away — 24/7, without anyone needing to check. That employee who spends 4 hours a day answering emails? They can finally do what you actually hired them for.
services.examples: Instant responses, less manual work, always available

services.title: Making data usable
services.description: Your info is scattered everywhere. We bring it all together in one place — automatically, without anyone needing to lift a finger.
services.examples: Clarity instead of chaos, always up to date

services.title: Streamlining processes
services.description: A customer sends an email, and the invoice is already there. Because the system recognized the request, processed it, and forwarded it — without you having to do a thing.
services.examples: Fewer steps, fewer mistakes, done faster

whatWeDo.footer: The specific solution is discovered per client. We don't sell a fixed list — we solve what we find.

voorbeelden.heading: Here's what we've built, for example.

cases.description: An online store with hundreds of customer questions per week. We built an AI chatbot that answers 80% of all questions instantly — no human needed.
A restaurant with international guests. We built a system that automatically translates and keeps the menu up to date in more than 12 languages.
A hotel where guests have questions around the clock. We built a digital concierge available 24/7 via chat — from room service to restaurant tips.

howItWorks.heading: From first chat to running system.

steps.title: Getting to know you
steps.description: We listen. Where are you losing time? What drains your energy? No sales pitch — just a good conversation.

steps.title: Analysis & proposal
steps.description: We map out your processes and come back with a clear plan. What we'll build, what it'll save you, what it costs. No surprises.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We build and test with your real data. You see what's happening along the way.

steps.title: Live & support
steps.description: It's running. We keep an eye on things and optimize where needed.

whySocialo.body: We handle the tech. You just notice that it works. Something that does exactly what you need — tailor-made for your situation.

persoonlijk.heading: Hey, I'm Terence.
persoonlijk.body: I'd love to help you automate your business. Leave your details and our assistant will get you started.
persoonlijk.formErrorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
persoonlijk.chatWelcome: Hey {name}! Great to have you here. Tell me, what kind of business do you run and what are you struggling with?
persoonlijk.chatWelcomeBack: Welcome back, {name}! Let's pick up where we left off. Where were we?
persoonlijk.chatFinished: Thanks for your message! Terence will get back to you as soon as possible.
persoonlijk.errorRateLimit: You've sent too many messages. Please try again later.
persoonlijk.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
